description: Nearly complete letter in Judaeo-Arabic to "my brother." Refers to selling items in the Rif and reports that other goods have safely arrived. Some of the commodity names are obscure (שית וידי . . . טובה . . . חגר אלרגל). Mentions a suftaja and maybe bricks (ṭūba). Opens and closes with mention of condolences. Needs further examination.
